can: submit a right-of-reply or correction request

publishing_rule: No single role can publish unilaterally. Publishing requires dual review + legal/safety gate.
admin_review_process: Daily queue triage by category and evidence strength.
Dual-review assignment (two independent reviewers, no self-approval).
Legal/safety gate sign-off on phrasing, privacy, and right-of-reply contact.
Publish decision logged immutably (who, when, why).
Appeals/rebuttals routed to senior reviewer; published entries can be updated or unpublished with reasons recorded.
Periodic re-audit of live entries when new evidence or rulings appear.
Quarterly methodology review + public transparency report.
